use_codes.desc: PREVENTION OF CMV DISEASE IN KIDNEY, HEART, AND KIDNEY-PANCREAS TRANSPLANT PATIENTS AT HIGH RISK (DONOR CMV SEROPOSITIVE/RECIPIENT CMV SERONEGATIVE)
